'''zaputu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fmz|fmz]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-p-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fmz|fmz]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zaputu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæpitith|zæpitith]] || [[word:zæpitij|zæpitij]] || [[word:zæpitish|zæpitish]] || [[word:zæpiti|zæpiti]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zapupututh|zapupututh]] || [[word:zapuputuj|zapuputuj]] || [[word:zapuputush|zapuputush]] || [[word:zapuputu|zapuputu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zapututh|zapututh]] || [[word:zaputuj|zaputuj]] || [[word:zaputush|zaputush]] || [[word:zaputu|zaputu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zapuftuth|zapuftuth]] || [[word:zapuftuj|zapuftuj]] || [[word:zapuftush|zapuftush]] || [[word:zapuftuf|zapuftuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zapututhu|zapututhu]] || [[word:zaputuju|zaputuju]] || [[word:zaputushu|zaputushu]] || [[word:zaputuku|zaputuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zapututh|zapututh]] || [[word:zaputuj|zaputuj]] || [[word:zaputush|zaputush]] || [[word:zaputu|zaputu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zapututhul|zapututhul]] || [[word:zaputujul|zaputujul]] || [[word:zaputushul|zaputushul]] || [[word:zaputukul|zaputukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zapututhuthu|zapututhuthu]] || [[word:zaputujuju|zaputujuju]] || [[word:zaputushushu|zaputushushu]] || [[word:zaputuku|zaputuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zapututhun|zapututhun]] || [[word:zaputujun|zaputujun]] || [[word:zaputushun|zaputushun]] || [[word:zaputukun|zaputukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zapututhuoro|zapututhuoro]] || [[word:zaputujuoro|zaputujuoro]] || [[word:zaputushuoro|zaputushuoro]] || [[word:zaputukuoro|zaputukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
